# Liberty English Cream Golden Retrievers

> Champion-sired English Cream Golden Retriever puppies raised in our home in Knox, Indiana. OFA health tested, early neurological stimulation, and lifetime breeder support.

## About
Liberty English Cream Golden Retrievers is a small-scale breeding program in Knox, Indiana, owned and operated by Ruth Norlington. We specialize in English Cream (also known as British or European-style) Golden Retrievers with champion European bloodlines.

## What We Offer
- Champion-sired English Cream Golden Retriever puppies
- OFA health testing: hips, elbows, eyes (CAER), and full genetic panel
- Early neurological stimulation (ENS) and early scent introduction (ESI)
- Home-raised puppies with daily socialization and potty training
- Lifetime breeder support for every puppy family
- Flight nanny delivery available worldwide

## Credentials
- Good Dog Certified Breeder
- AKC registered breeding program
- European champion stud dog
- OFA health tested parents

## Pricing
- Puppies: $3,000
- Non-refundable deposit: $500
